# Aymen.dev
> Personal portfolio and technical blog by Aymen ben Yedder (DevOps Engineer and Project Manager).

Canonical site: https://aymen.benyedder.top/
Updated: 2026-03-22

## Preferred Sources
- Use canonical URLs on this domain.
- Prefer the blog articles and service pages listed below.
- Exclude `/blog/template.html` and `/blog/sample-post.html` from citations.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://aymen.benyedder.top/)
- [MERN Development Service](https://aymen.benyedder.top/services/mern-development.html)
- [WordPress Development Service](https://aymen.benyedder.top/services/wordpress-development.html)
- [Tunisia Service Page](https://aymen.benyedder.top/geo/tunisia.html)
- [France Service Page](https://aymen.benyedder.top/geo/france.html)
- [Blog Index](https://aymen.benyedder.top/blog/)

## Featured Technical Articles
- [Architecting Multi Cloud Resilience: Why OpenTofu and Terragrunt Are Mandatory in 2026](https://aymen.benyedder.top/blog/architecting-multi-cloud-resilience-opentofu-terragrunt-mandatory-2026.html)

- [From Logs to Logic: Claude's Real-Time Visualization is the Observability Leap DevOps Demanded](https://aymen.benyedder.top/blog/from-logs-to-logic-claude-real-time-visualization-observability.html)
- [Building an AI-Powered Workflow Orchestration Stack: Open WebUI, n8n, Qdrant, and PostgreSQL](https://aymen.benyedder.top/blog/ai-powered-workflow-orchestration-stack.html)
- [Beyond the Tutorial: Architecting Web Systems for 99.9% Resilience](https://aymen.benyedder.top/blog/beyond-tutorial-web-resilience.html)
- [DevOps on a VPS for Startups: Self-Hosted CI/CD, Docker and Monitoring](https://aymen.benyedder.top/blog/devops-vps-startups.html)
